headline: Is Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) Among ARK Invest’s Top Stock Picks for 2026?
summary: Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) is among the ARK Invest Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stock Picks for 2026. On March 2, Barclays analyst Benjamin Budish maintained the firm’s Equal-Weight rating on the stock with a price target of $148. This is a reaffirmation of the firm’s prior adjustment on February 13, when it slashed the price target […]

headline: Trump Meeting Puts Coinbase In Focus As Valuation And Policy Diverge
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) CEO Brian Armstrong held a private meeting with former President Donald Trump. Following the meeting, Trump publicly endorsed the cryptocurrency sector and called for supportive digital asset legislation. Trump urged banks to work with crypto firms and pressed Congress to advance bills such as the Clarity Act. For Coinbase Global, which trades under the ticker NasdaqGS:COIN, this political attention comes at a time when the share price is around $197.22. The...
